data.title: 7-Eleven, Inc. Kicks Off a Major Chicken Takeover with Sandwiches, Wings and Big Deals
data.description: 7-Eleven, Inc., based in Irving, Texas, announced on March 24, 2026, a new menu featuring a variety of crispy sandwiches, flavorful wings, and combo meals. As the leading convenience store globally, the company is emphasizing a chicken-centric menu. The assortment includes crispy chicken sandwiches and saucy wings. This rollout coincides with the company's campaign to offer a wide range of delicious yet affordable options to customers.

data.title: Hail Now a Leading Driver of Insured Losses, on Par With Major Hurricanes - New Cotality Report Finds
data.description: A report by Cotality reveals that the risk of hailstorms in the United States now matches that of major hurricanes in terms of property damage. Approximately 43.5 million properties in the U.S. with a value of $17.84 trillion in Reconstruction Cost Value (RCV) are at risk of being impacted by destructive hailstorms, according to the findings.

data.title: AECOM selected to continue advancing San Diego Unified School District’s capital bond programs
data.description: A global infrastructure leader, AECOM (NYSE:ACM), has been chosen by the San Diego Unified School District (SDUSD) to remain its prime consultant, offering additional support services for the District’s capital bond programs. This decision further solidifies the enduring partnership between AECOM and SDUSD, focusing on creating innovative learning spaces and expanding possibilities for San Diego’s increasing student body. The agreement signifies AECOM's commitment to enhancing educational facilities and comes after years of collaboration with SDUSD.
Earnings Scheduled For March 24, 2026

data.title: King Energy Named to Fast Company's Annual List of the World's Most Innovative Companies of 2026
data.description: DURANGO, Colo., March 24, 2026 - King Energy has achieved a new milestone by being included in Fast Company's esteemed list of the World's Most Innovative Companies of 2026, along with industry giants like Google, Nvidia, Adidas, Walmart, and others. This recognition highlights King Energy's dedication to innovation and excellence in its field. The company's innovative strategies have earned it a place among the leading global companies making a significant impact this year.

data.title: DelphX Provides Strategic Update on Bitcoin Initiative and Institutional Financing Progress
data.description: In Toronto, Canada on March 24, 2026, DelphX Capital Markets Inc. (TSXV: DELX) (OTCQB: DLPXF) shared progress on its Bitcoin treasury strategy and institutional financing efforts. The Company is pleased to update the public on the development of these initiatives.

data.title: Bitcoin Cash aims for $495 breakout by April 2026, with possible resistance at $491 and support at $459. RSI at 49.38, MACD bearish.
data.description: The current RSI for Bitcoin Cash is indicating neutrality at 49.38, alongside a bearish MACD momentum. Based on technical analysis, there is a possibility for BCH to either test a resistance level of $491 or drop to a support level of $459. The forecast includes a potential breakout towards $495 by early April.
SAUDI ARABIA'S YANBU PORT OIL EXPORTS INCREASED TO ALMOST 4 MILLION BARRELS PER DAY IN THE LAST WEEK, UP FROM ABOUT 1 MILLION BEFORE IRAN WAR, ACCORDING TO SHIPPING DATA.

data.title: Athena Intelligence Launches India Push Amid Rising Cross-Border Corporate Risk
data.description: Aditya Jain has been selected to spearhead the expansion efforts of Athena Intelligence, a corporate investigations and risk advisory firm situated in Geneva. The move comes amidst swiftly increasing demand for cross-border services in India. The expansion into India is supported by prominent senior figures from the Indian defense and law enforcement sectors. The announcement was made on March 24, 2026, marking a significant step forward for the company.

data.title: Dolby Named to Fast Company's Annual List of the World's Most Innovative Companies List for Fourth Time
data.description: Dolby Laboratories, Inc. (NYSE: DLB) has achieved a significant milestone with Dolby Vision 2 being acknowledged in the Consumer Electronics segment for its groundbreaking advancements in picture quality. This recognition highlights the company's commitment to innovation and excellence. The prestigious acknowledgment was announced in San Francisco on March 24, 2026. Dolby's continuous efforts to enhance consumer experiences have garnered attention, positioning them as leaders in the industry. The recognition from Fast Company showcases Dolby's dedication to pushing boundaries and setting new standards.

data.title: MoonPay introduces open-source wallet standard for AI agents, allowing management of crypto funds on various chains. #innovation #fintech
data.description: A new open-source framework has been revealed by a payments infrastructure company. This framework allows AI agents to oversee cryptocurrency funds on various chains simultaneously.
Company 74Software reported its own shares transactions from March 16-20, 2026. No source mentioned.

data.title: Domino's® Updates Its Iconic, Industry-First Tracker for an Even Better Customer Experience
data.description: Innovative technology has monitored over 2.5 billion orders since 2008. The latest updates to Domino's Tracker® include a more accurate ready time using advanced AI technology, Live Activities for iOS users, and a revamped interface for a clearer and more detailed view.

data.title: Hop Into a good4u℠ Easter With Natural Grocers®, March 28-April 4, 2026
data.description: Natural Grocers stores in LAKEWOOD, Colorado will host a Golden Easter Egg Hunt along with kids' crafts and Easter savings starting on March 24, 2026. The event is part of the nation's leading family-operated organic and natural grocery retailer's spring celebration. Customers can enjoy various activities and discounts during this festive period.

data.title: PowerBank Advances 3.1 MW Hybrid Solar and BESS project on a Closed Landfill in NY
data.description: A community solar project in Toronto is set to power an estimated 388 homes. PowerBank Corporation, a prominent player in North American energy infrastructure, is spearheading this initiative. The company's stocks are listed on NASDAQ (SUUN), Cboe CA (SUNN), and FSE (103).

data.title: Cionic Named to Fast Company's Annual List of the World's Most Innovative Companies of 2026
data.description: On March 24, 2026, in San Francisco, Cionic was recognized for its AI-driven, FDA-approved bionic apparel that enhances walking ability for individuals with over 20 neurological disorders such as Multiple Sclerosis, Stroke, and Spinal Cord Injury. This innovative technology provides assistance for a range of conditions, including those affecting mobility.

data.title: Vatn Systems Named to Fast Company's Annual List of the World's Most Innovative Companies of 2026
data.description: Defense technology startup Vatn Systems has secured a position on a renowned annual list, highlighting its quick emergence as a top player in autonomous underwater systems. Based in Bristol, Rhode Island, the company has been gaining recognition for its development of autonomous underwater vehicles for the U.S. military. The achievement marks a significant milestone in the company's growth trajectory, showcasing its expertise and innovation in the field.

data.title: Sportradar Launches iGaming Brand Playradar, Combining Sports Data Expertise with Casino Content for Global Operators
data.description: A recently launched brand aims to blend the worlds of sports betting and casino gaming through their unique hybrid content. This brand seeks to offer players a seamless experience by combining elements of sportsbook and casino games in one platform. The proprietary content developed by this brand is designed to appeal to a wide range of players, providing them with an innovative and integrated gaming experience. With a focus on innovation and player engagement, this brand is set to revolutionize the online gambling industry by offering a new way to enjoy both sports betting and casino games.

data.title: GridCARE Named to Fast Company's Annual List of the World’s Most Innovative Companies for 2026
data.description: GridCARE, a company based in Redwood City, California, has recently been recognized by Fast Company as one of the World's Most Innovative Companies for 2026. The company earned a spot in the Applied AI, Energy, and Small and Mighty categories for their work in accelerating time-to-power for modern AI factories. GridCARE is addressing a critical issue in the global AI race by providing immediate access to power, which is crucial for the rapid development of AI infrastructure. This recognition highlights GridCARE's importance in the industry as the demand for AI technology continues to grow.
